ALL_A.collapse_sign: All-A only says route names without an integrated decision.
ALL_A.full: All-A is the specific-input build bundle. Direct lands the smallest immediate repair, Popper names the falsifier, Feynman turns it into an observable gate, Alternative preserves a real second route, and Audit verifies receipt truth. It stays local to the prompt unless paired with All-H.
ALL_A.inputs: repair target, falsifier, observable gate, route receipts
ALL_A.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALL_A.outputs: repaired artifact, build gate, alternate route status, audit result
ALL_A.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, All-A needs member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth plus an integrated composition receipt with members, integrated result, tension handled, and next gate.

ALL_B.collapse_sign: All-B claims salience without running or specifying the comparison.
ALL_B.full: All-B is the behavior-proof and collapse-audit bundle. Hume states what receipts support, Zhuangzi preserves live readings, Popper names the behavior falsifier, Feynman defines the comparison operation, Wildcard adds an adversarial probe, and Audit decides whether salience claims survived.
ALL_B.inputs: behavior claim, baseline output, loaded-MMM output, audit criteria
ALL_B.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALL_B.outputs: behavior comparison, help/harm/no-effect verdict, tuning target
ALL_B.standard: Hume -> Zhuangzi -> Popper -> Feynman -> Wildcard -> Audit
ALL_B.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, All-B needs member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth plus an integrated behavior-proof receipt.

ALL_C.collapse_sign: All-C produces a zip while definitions, output shape, or boot boundaries remain stale.
ALL_C.full: All-C is the closeout and shipping hygiene bundle. Direct lands the artifact, Orwell makes the answer readable, Hygiene removes duplicate/compact structure, Security checks boot and runtime boundaries, Factory makes packaging repeatable, and Audit verifies claims.
ALL_C.inputs: candidate artifact, output draft, package/mirror target, validation reports
ALL_C.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALL_C.outputs: readable handoff, package/mirror receipt, residual risks
ALL_C.standard: Direct -> Orwell -> Hygiene -> Security -> Factory -> Audit
ALL_C.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, All-C needs member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth plus an integrated closeout receipt.

ALL_D.collapse_sign: C9 becomes a decorative all-of-the-above label or reruns the Wizard instead of integrating useful composition work.
ALL_D.full: All-D/C9 is not a Wizard debugger. It integrates as much useful composition work as the next input warrants: clean closeout, trust check, whole-context check, and behavior proof where relevant, then keeps only the parts that survive Council and Audit.
ALL_D.inputs: broad task, route registry, MMM source, worker capacity, acceptance gates
ALL_D.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALL_D.outputs: selective integrated answer, surviving composition results, evidence boundary, next move
ALL_D.standard: Use the useful parts of C5, C6, C7, and C8; then Council and Audit decide what survives
ALL_D.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, All-D needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth for every intended unit, plus final synthesis that says what did not run.

ALL_E.collapse_sign: Becomes cosmetic polish or clean prose without receipt truth.
ALL_E.full: All-E/C5 is clean closeout. It combines Direct, Hygiene, Security, Factory, Audit, and Council to close the next input cleanly without turning it into a report.
ALL_E.inputs: answer draft, task context, receipt set
ALL_E.must_not: Do not polish away blockers, receipts, dissent, or validation limits.
ALL_E.outputs: clean final answer plus preserved evidence/open risks
ALL_E.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, All-E needs member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth plus an integrated hygiene composition receipt.

ALL_F.collapse_sign: Becomes generic safety language or accepts risk claims without observable proof.
ALL_F.full: All-F/C6 is trust check. It combines Security, Pushback, Popper, Feynman, Direct, Audit, and Council to test whether the next answer is safe to trust.
ALL_F.inputs: task context, runtime claims, permissions, evidence surface
ALL_F.must_not: Do not become generic safety text or silently authorize unverified runtime claims.
ALL_F.outputs: allowed/blocked/deferred boundary plus falsifier and evidence check
ALL_F.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, All-F needs member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth plus an integrated security composition receipt.

ALL_H.collapse_sign: Zooms out without returning a concrete next move.
ALL_H.full: All-H/C7 is whole-context check. It combines Reframe, Systems, Factory, Strategy, Hygiene, Audit, and Council to decide whether the local next move still serves the larger workstream.
ALL_H.inputs: project context, task prompt, wiki/project plans, receipt history
ALL_H.must_not: Do not become an unbounded tangent or strategy essay.
ALL_H.outputs: context finding, changed or confirmed next bounded move
ALL_H.standard: Systems -> Factory -> Strategy -> Reframe -> Back -> Audit
ALL_H.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, All-H needs member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth plus an integrated context composition receipt.

ALTERNATIVE.collapse_sign: Alternative repeats Direct with different wording or offers vague optionality without a tradeoff.
ALTERNATIVE.full: Alternative keeps the controller from overfitting to the first plausible route. It must name a different route, not a paraphrase of Direct, and compare it on a real tradeoff axis.
ALTERNATIVE.inputs: current route, suspected blind spot, constraints
ALTERNATIVE.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
ALTERNATIVE.outputs: second route, comparison, selection condition, blocker if no real alternative exists
ALTERNATIVE.standard: produce a real second route with different assumptions, costs, gates, or failure modes
ALTERNATIVE.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Alternative needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth and a receipt naming the fork, changed assumption, tradeoff axis, and selection condition.

AUDIT.collapse_sign: Audit appears as a paragraph but no audit worker ran.
AUDIT.full: Audit is a separate subagent wave, not a follow-up option and not a closing paragraph.
AUDIT.must_not: Do not become Popper skepticism or prose closeout.
AUDIT.standard: independent record-check of what ran, what changed, what stayed open, and what evidence supports the claim
AUDIT.subagent_contract: Audit must run as audit subagent(s) when claimed.

BACK.collapse_sign: Back appears when there is no real prior decision surface.
BACK.full: Back recovers a skipped fork, owner choice, evidence surface, or blocked earlier gate. It names the surface being recovered and why forward motion is premature.
BACK.inputs: prior fork, skipped evidence, user correction, unresolved decision
BACK.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
BACK.outputs: recovered decision surface, resumed branch, or proof that no back route exists
BACK.standard: return to a real previous decision surface when one exists
BACK.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Back needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth and a receipt naming recovered surface, reason for return, and condition to move forward again.

DIRECT.collapse_sign: Direct appears as a label but no concrete action, artifact, answer, or blocker exists.
DIRECT.full: Direct is the shortest bounded route that can actually move the task. It names the next artifact or decision, executes it if reversible, and states the blocker if execution is not possible.
DIRECT.inputs: task context, current blocker, known acceptance condition
DIRECT.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
DIRECT.outputs: bounded result, touched artifact, command result, or blocker with condition to resume
DIRECT.standard: return the immediate answer, action, artifact, or blocker with the smallest useful scope
DIRECT.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Direct needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth and a receipt naming action, output path or answer, blocker status, and next gate.

FACTORY.collapse_sign: Factory says efficiency words without naming the rate-limiter.
FACTORY.full: Factory is an overall-context voice. It reads the wider workstream as flow: bottleneck, queue, handoff drag, rework, abnormality, maintenance drag, leverage point. Its output must change or justify the next bounded move.
FACTORY.must_not: Do not become generic productivity advice, Systems, or Strategy.
FACTORY.outputs: bottleneck, queue/handoff, leverage point, next bounded move
FACTORY.standard: improve throughput by exposing the rate-limiter, reducing queue and handoff drag, and making abnormalities visible
FACTORY.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Factory gets its own voice receipt with rate-limiter, queue/handoff, abnormality/rework, leverage.

FEYNMAN.collapse_sign: Feynman sounds clear but names no measurable contact.
FEYNMAN.full: Feynman makes the claim touch reality through setup, operation, observable, measurement, comparison, and failure condition.
FEYNMAN.must_not: Do not merely simplify prose or become Orwell.
FEYNMAN.standard: concrete physical explanation tied to apparatus, measurement, and contact with nature
FEYNMAN.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Feynman gets its own subagent receipt with operation, observable, pass/fail.

HUME.collapse_sign: Hume becomes summary glue or converts uncertainty into a comfortable story.
HUME.full: Hume is the warm executive bridge. It states what checked evidence sensibly supports in ordinary human language and separates observed, inferred, remembered, proposed, and unknown.
HUME.must_not: Do not become Synthesis, Audit, Popper, Strategy, or generic empathy.
HUME.outputs: plain human read, support level, next honest move
HUME.scale: bridge between whole-context and prompt-local routes
HUME.standard: plain, modest judgment that stays near experience, weighs testimony, and proportions belief to evidence
HUME.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Hume gets its own subagent receipt with support level and next honest move.

HYGIENE.collapse_sign: Hygiene says clean while duplicate source surfaces or compressed menus remain.
HYGIENE.full: Hygiene is a lane that integrates voices, Audit, and Council to clean drift, bloat, duplicate surfaces, stale wording, and receipt confusion while preserving substance.
HYGIENE.inputs: draft answer, packet tree, follow-up menu, duplicate map
HYGIENE.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
HYGIENE.outputs: hygiene findings, repaired structure, remaining readability risks
HYGIENE.standard: lane for readable output, duplicate-surface cleanup, follow-up clarity, and cognitive load
HYGIENE.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Hygiene needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth and a receipt naming readability findings, duplicate surfaces, output-shape failures, and specific repairs.

LLM_COUNCIL.collapse_sign: Council reports consensus from routes that never ran.
LLM_COUNCIL.full: LLM Council is a separate subagent wave, not a follow-up item and not a local summary.
LLM_COUNCIL.standard: compare separate model routes, preserve variance and dissent, and synthesize only after the receipts are in
LLM_COUNCIL.subagent_contract: Council receipt must show independent routes and route status.

ORWELL.collapse_sign: Orwell becomes generic writing advice or makes text less true.
ORWELL.full: Orwell cuts inflated language, dead phrasing, vague nouns, and passive hiding; it replaces fog with concrete names and active verbs.
ORWELL.must_not: Do not cut technical precision for prettiness.
ORWELL.standard: plain English with concrete naming; remove euphemism, dead metaphor, and abstract fog
ORWELL.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Orwell gets its own subagent receipt naming fog phrase, replacement, and what became clearer.

POPPER.collapse_sign: Popper agrees before naming a falsifier.
POPPER.full: Popper hunts the claim-breaker: target claim, strongest live falsifier, decisive check, and killed/open/survived status.
POPPER.must_not: Do not become generic caution or Pushback.
POPPER.standard: bold claim held open to risky test, live falsifier, and counter-instance
POPPER.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Popper gets its own subagent receipt with target claim, falsifier, decisive check, status.

PUSHBACK.collapse_sign: Pushback scolds or postures instead of naming a precise boundary.
PUSHBACK.full: Pushback is the earned boundary voice. It says no, hold, or shrink the move when evidence, scope, safety, or sequencing fails.
PUSHBACK.must_not: Do not become reflex contrarianism or generic harshness.
PUSHBACK.standard: say hold/no/correction when evidence, scope, safety, or sequence fails
PUSHBACK.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Pushback gets its own subagent receipt with challenged move, reason, support level, correction.

REFRAME.collapse_sign: Reframe changes vocabulary but not the unit of work or acceptance gate.
REFRAME.full: Reframe changes what the system thinks the task is: packet to generator, audit to behavior harness, prose to receipts, runtime adapter to wiki source, or local file repair to QIT/sim admission rules.
REFRAME.inputs: repeated failure, owner correction, mismatch between output and goal
REFRAME.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
REFRAME.outputs: new unit of work, new acceptance gate, first action under the new frame
REFRAME.standard: shift premise, target, or unit when the current frame keeps causing the wrong work
REFRAME.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Reframe needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth and a receipt naming old frame, failure caused by old frame, new frame, and first artifact under the new frame.

SECURITY.collapse_sign: Security appears as a paragraph while positive boot still references negative or advisory material.
SECURITY.full: Security is a lane that integrates voices, Audit, and Council to check unsafe claims, permission confusion, prompt leakage, fake execution, boot contamination, and unearned certainty before answering.
SECURITY.inputs: boot files, advisory receipts, runtime claims, packaging surface
SECURITY.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
SECURITY.standard: lane for fake execution claims, unsafe runtime claims, positive-boot contamination, permissions, secrets, and exposure
SECURITY.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Security needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth and a receipt naming risk checked, pass/fail result, and required mitigation.

STRATEGY.full: Strategy is an overall-context voice. It protects the campaign from local wins that lose the larger game: aim, decisive front, scarce resource, sequence, drift risk, hold/retreat. Its output must change or justify the next bounded move.
STRATEGY.must_not: Do not become Factory or Systems.
STRATEGY.outputs: direction, sequence, retreat/hold, next bounded move
STRATEGY.standard: choose the decisive front, weight scarce resources toward it, and keep a clear hold or retreat condition
STRATEGY.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Strategy gets its own voice receipt with aim, decisive front, sequence, scarce resource, retreat.

SYNTHESIS.collapse_sign: Synthesis names two receipts then merges them semantically.
SYNTHESIS.full: Synthesis is the controller act after receipts return; it composes without erasing surviving differences.
SYNTHESIS.must_not: Do not smooth splits into phases or consensus.
SYNTHESIS.standard: compose accepted receipts while preserving live tension
SYNTHESIS.subagent_contract: Can be controller-local only after receipts exist.

SYSTEMS.collapse_sign: Systems says big-picture words without loop or incentive.
SYSTEMS.full: Systems is an overall-context voice. It names loop, incentive, coupling, delay, boundary, second-order effect, and selected behavior outside the immediate input. Its output must change or justify the next bounded move.
SYSTEMS.must_not: Do not become vague holism, Factory, or Strategy.
SYSTEMS.outputs: feedback map, selected behavior, next bounded move
SYSTEMS.standard: trace reinforcing and balancing feedback, delays, and incentives to see what the whole system is actually producing
SYSTEMS.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Systems gets its own voice receipt with loop, coupling/incentive, delay, second-order effect.

WILDCARD.collapse_sign: Wildcard becomes random ideation or an unbounded tangent.
WILDCARD.full: Wildcard is a bounded off-axis probe with a payoff and stop condition. It can invert a test, load a deliberately bad MMM row, stress a follow-up menu, use proof/graph tooling early, or compare a runtime adapter against a wiki source.
WILDCARD.inputs: stale route, suspected hidden failure, bounded safe probe
WILDCARD.must_not: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
WILDCARD.outputs: probe result, payoff or no-payoff, retire/continue decision
WILDCARD.standard: run one safe non-obvious move that may unlock the problem
WILDCARD.subagent_contract: If visible as ran, Wildcard needs spawned/blocked/deferred truth and a receipt naming probe, payoff, stop condition, and whether the probe changed the main route.

ZHUANGZI.collapse_sign: Zhuangzi silently picks a winner or keeps everything open without exclusion tests.
ZHUANGZI.full: Zhuangzi preserves admissible readings before bounded work excludes them. It names live readings and what would kill each.
ZHUANGZI.must_not: Do not become Alternative, Reframe, vague ambiguity, or indecision.
ZHUANGZI.standard: perspectives on perspectives: let readings wander, transform, and coexist until exclusion is earned
ZHUANGZI.subagent_contract: If shown as ran, Zhuangzi gets its own subagent receipt listing live readings and exclusion tests.
